Isha Cocktail Party 1763045687587810300 — Tailored Layered Outfit With Detail

A isha cocktail party 1763045687587810300 showing layered silhouettes, visible texture and tailored lines; neutral tones with subtle contrast and structured details.

Add a slim belt and low-profile loafers for balance.
